issues.title: feat: payment checkout flow
issues.body:
Implement the payment checkout that consumes the payment gateway. It integrates the payment settlement path in `src/checkout.ts`.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] `src/checkout.ts` completes a payment

issues.title: feat: payment gateway schema
issues.body:
Define the payment gateway schema and interface contract in `src/schema.ts`.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] `src/schema.ts` declares the payment gateway type
